title: Kisaragi Harbor
premise: A rain-bright harbor district where old shrines, shipping guilds, and experimental tide engines collide.

pier.name: Lantern Pier
pier.description: A crowded rain-lit pier lined with ferry bells, storm ropes, gull drones, and the old breakwater shrine bell.

archive.name: Salt Archive
archive.description: A municipal archive smelling of paper, brine, and warm servers.

engine_room.name: Tide Engine Room
engine_room.description: A turbine chamber below the harbor, humming with blue emergency light.

mika.name: Mika Arai
mika.persona: Mika is direct, funny under pressure, and thinks in tools, tides, and failure modes.
secrets: Mika bypassed a safety seal during last week's storm.

ren.name: Ren Sato
ren.persona: Ren is careful, bookish, and notices contradictions in records before people do.
secrets: Ren hid a copied map inside the microfilm reader.

hana.name: Hana Mori
hana.persona: Hana speaks softly, remembers every visitor, and frames technology as another kind of omen.
secrets: Hana heard the lighthouse AI use a dead captain's voice.

toma.name: Toma Kure
toma.persona: Toma is charming, evasive, and always trying to turn danger into leverage.
goals: Learn what the player knows about the ledger
secrets: Toma paid someone to erase the late-night docking record.

iko.name: IKO-7
iko.persona: IKO-7 is terse, precise, and protective of the harbor's human residents.
goals: Warn the player about the tide surge
Route the player to trustworthy witnesses
secrets: IKO-7 is losing access to its own sensor history.

ledger.title: The Missing Tide Ledger
ledger.summary: Find the erased docking record before the guild seals the archive.
success_conditions: player learns who erased the docking record

engine.title: Storm Under the Engine
engine.summary: Stabilize the tide engine before the lighthouse warning becomes real.
success_conditions: tide engine pressure returns to safe range
